items.title: BME: Attractive Discount With Steady Monthly Distribution
items.description: BME trades at an attractive discount, offers a monthly distribution, and provides exposure to healthcare investments. Read on the bullish thesis of BME here.

items.title: EXCLUSIVE: Warren Buffett Is 'The Ultimate Investor' – Market Expert Jay Woods Says Berkshire CEO 'The Stuff Of Legends'
items.description: Ahead of Warren Buffett's exit as Berkshire Hathaway CEO, market expert Jay Woods shares his memories of the legendary investor with Benzinga.
